Af.description: Area of open buildings and other structures either normal to the wind direction or projected on a plane normal to the wind direction, ft 2 (m 2 )

Ag.description: Gross area of that wall in which Ao is identi fi ed, ft 2 (m 2 )

Agi.description: Sum of the gross surface areas of the building envelope (walls and roof) not including Ag , ft 2 (m 2 )

An.description: Normalized wind area for rooftop solar panels in Figure 29.4-7, ft 2 (m 2 )

Ao.description: Total area of openings in a wall that receives positive external pressure, ft 2 (m 2 )

Aog.description: Total area of openings in the building envelope, ft 2 (m 2 )

Aoi.description: Sum of the areas of openings in the building envelope (walls and roof) not including Ao , ft 2 (m 2 )

As.description: Gross area of the solid freestanding wall or solid sign, ft 2 (m 2 )

a.description: Approximate lower bound natural frequency from Section 26.11.2

aB.description: Width of pressure coef fi cient zone for elevated buildings

B.description: Horizontal dimension of a building measured normal to wind direction

b.description: Mean hourly wind speed factor in Equation (26.1116), from Table 26.11-1

Cf.description: Force coef fi cient to be used in determination of wind loads for other structures

CN.description: Net pressure coef fi cient to be used in determination of wind loads for open buildings

Cp.description: External pressure coef fi cient to be used in determination of wind loads for buildings

c.description: Panel chord factor for use with rooftop solar panels in Equation (29.4-5)

dp.description: Horizontal distance of Zone 2 for ground-mounted solar panels in Figure 29.4.9

ds.description: Horizontal offset for ground-mounted solar panels in Figure 29.4.9

F.description: Design wind force for other structures, lb (N)

Fn.description: Normal force for ground-mounted solar panels in Figure 29.4-9, lb (N)

Gf.description: Gust-effect factor for MWFRS of fl exible buildings and other structures

nom.description: Nominal net pressure coef fi cient for rooftop solar panels determined from Figure 29.4-7

gQ.description: Peak factor for background response in Equations (26.11-6) and (26.11-10)

gR.description: Peak factor for resonant response in Equation (26.11-10)

gv.description: Peak factor for wind response in Equations (26.116) and (26.11-10)

H.description: Height of hill, ridge, or escarpment in Figure 26.8-1

h.description: Mean roof height of a building or height of other structure, except that eave height shall be used for roof angle θ less than or equal to 10 degrees, in ft (m)

hB.description: Height above grade of the bottom surface of the elevated building

he.description: Roof eave height at a particular wall, or the average height if the eave varies along the wall

hp.description: Height to top of parapet in Figures 27.5-2 and 30.6-1

hpt.description: Mean parapet height above the adjacent roof surface for use with Equation (29.4-5)

Kd.description: Wind directionality factor from Section 26.6 and Table 26.6-1

Kh.description: Velocity pressure exposure coef fi cient evaluated at height

Kz.description: Velocity pressure exposure coef fi cient evaluated at height z

Kzt.description: Topographic factor as de fi ned in Section 26.8

L.description: Horizontal dimension of a building measured parallel to the wind direction

Lb.description: Normalized building length, for use with Figure 29.4-7

Lc.description: Panel chord length for ground-mounted solar panels in Figure 29.4-9

Lh.description: Distance upwind of crest of hill, ridge, or escarpment in Figure 26.8-1 to where the difference in ground elevation is half the height of the hill, ridge, or escarpment

Lp.description: Panel chord length for use with rooftop solar panels in Figure 29.4-7

Lr.description: Horizontal dimension of return corner for a solid freestanding wall or solid sign from Figure 29.3-1

l.description: Integral length scale factor from Table 26.11-1

Mc.description: Moment for ground-mounted solar panels in Figure 29.4.9, lb-ft (N-m)

Ns.description: Reduced frequency for ground-mounted solar panels

n.description: Lowest natural frequency for ground-mounted solar panels

p.description: Design pressure to be used in determination of wind loads for buildings, lb/ft 2 (N/m 2 )

PL.description: Wind pressure acting on leeward face in Figure 27.3-8, lb/ft 2 (N/m 2 )

qi.description: Velocity pressure for internal pressure determination, lb/ft 2 (N/m 2 )

qp.description: Velocity pressure at top of parapet, lb/ft 2 (N/m 2 )

qz.description: Velocity pressure evaluated at height z above ground, lb/ft 2 (N/m 2 )

S.description: Center-to-center row spacing for ground-mounted solar panels in Figure 29.4-9

SL.description: Open distance in longitudinal direction for ground-mounted solar panels in Figure 29.4-9

ST.description: Open distance in transverse direction for ground-mounted solar panels in Figure 29.4-9

s.description: Vertical dimension of the solid freestanding wall or solid sign from Figure 29.3-1

V.description: Basic wind speed obtained from Figures 26.5-1A through 26.5-1D, mi/h (m/s); the basic wind speed corresponds to a 3 s gust speed at 33 ft (10 m) above the ground in Exposure Category C

Vz.description: Mean hourly wind speed at height z , in ft/s (m/s)

W.description: Width of building in Figures 30.3-3, 30.3-5A, and 30.3-5B and width of span in Figures 30.3-4 and 30.3-6

Wg.description: Shortest row length for ground-mounted solar panels in Figure 29.4-9

WL.description: Width of a building on its longest side in Figure 29.4-7

WS.description: Width of a building on its shortest side in Figure 29.4-7

x.description: Distance upwind or downwind of crest in Figure 26.8-1

g.description: Nominal height of the atmospheric boundary layer used in this standard (values appear in Table 26.11-1)

\u03b1.description: Mean hourly wind-speed power law exponent in Equation (26.11-16) from Table 26.11-1

\u03b2.description: Damping ratio, percent critical for buildings or other structures

E.description: Array edge factor for use with rooftop solar panels in Figure 29.4-7 and Equations (29.4-4) and (29.4-5)

\u03b5.description: Ratio of solid area to gross area for solid freestanding wall, solid sign, open sign, face of a trussed tower, or lattice structure

\u03b7.description: Value used in Equations (26.11-15a) and (26.1115b); see Section 26.11.4

\u03b8.description: Angle of plane of roof from horizontal
